title: Deltarune TP Bar over Iron's Spellbooks Mana
description: Replaces the mana bar in Iron's Spells and Spellbooks with the Deltarune TP bar
body:
Make your mage battles feel more tense. This simply replaces the mana bar in Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks with the Tension Point bar from Deltarune.

Obviously, you need the [Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks](https://modrinth.com/mod/irons-spells-n-spellbooks) mod, otherwise this resource pack has no effect.
